steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student claims audiences ultimately preferred "resolution and closure" over the ongoing tension of the serial. The question asks which finding best supports that claim.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'production cost data': measures budget, not audience preference. ✗
  • Choice B — 'higher viewership for the finale': shows audiences were most invested when resolution arrived — directly supports preferring closure. ✓
  • Choice C — 'modern critical reception': reflects later critics, not the original audience's preference. ✗
  • Choice D — 'genre classification': categorizes the show but says nothing about what audiences preferred. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
